init.title: Aptner Variable Settings
init.description:
Set data collection interval and expiration time manually.

[Form Reset Switch Guide]

■ Reset Visit Form Switch
- ON : Instantly clears input fields upon successful reservation
- OFF : Making multiple continuous entries with same data (Reset = 0)

■ Reset Preset Form Switch
- ON : Restarts preset booking dates to today upon completion
- OFF : Reserving multiple preset slots for the same period (Reset = 0)
